zh.siteSubtitle: 旧约启示录文学（约公元前165年）
zh.homeIntro1: 《但以理书》是《旧约圣经》中最重要的启示录式文学作品之一。书中记述了犹太先知但以理在巴比伦被掳时期（约公元前6世纪）的故事与异象。全书共12章，前6章为叙事（但以理在异邦宫廷的经历），后6章为启示性异象（末世预言）。
zh.homeIntro2: 但以理书的预言以象征性异象著称：巨型金像代表四大帝国的更迭，四兽从海中升起象征世界霸权的兴衰，七十个七的计算被视为弥赛亚降临的时间预言。这些异象深刻影响了犹太教末世论和基督教启示录传统。
zh.homeIntro3: 现代学术界普遍认为本书成书于安条克四世迫害犹太人时期（约公元前165年），以「预言」形式追述已发生的历史事件（vaticinium ex eventu）。无论持何种立场，但以理书的历史影响力是不可否认的——它塑造了西方文明中关于末世、弥赛亚和天国的核心概念。
zh.coreQuote: 「在列王在位的时候，天上的神必另立一国，永不败坏，也不归别国的人，却要打碎灭绝那一切国，这国必存到永远。」——但以理书 2:44
keyPointsList: 第2章 —— 尼布甲尼撒金像之梦：四大帝国更迭与天国降临
第5章 —— 墙上文字「弥尼弥尼提客勒乌法珥辛」：巴比伦覆灭的预兆
第7章 —— 四兽异象：从海中升起的四大帝国与「人子」的审判
第9章 —— 七十个七预言：弥赛亚降临的时间计算
第11章 —— 南北王争战：从波斯到希腊化时代的详细历史预言
第12章 —— 末世复活：义人复活与最终审判
sourceList: 预言原文来自《圣经·但以理书》标准译本（BibleGateway 和合本）
历史验证参考学术文献及百科资料（Wikipedia: Book of Daniel）
七十个七预言解读参考多种传统释经观点（Wikipedia: Seventy Weeks）
编者观点不代表任何宗教教派的官方立场
站点图标采用狮子轮廓——但以理在狮子坑中毫发无伤是本书最广为人知的故事

en.homeTitle: What is the Book of Daniel?
en.homeIntro1: The Book of Daniel is one of the most important apocalyptic works in the Old Testament. It recounts the stories and visions of the Jewish prophet Daniel during the Babylonian exile (c. 6th century BCE). The book has 12 chapters: the first 6 are narratives of Daniel's experiences in foreign courts, while chapters 7-12 contain apocalyptic visions and end-times prophecies.
en.homeIntro2: Daniel's prophecies are renowned for their symbolic imagery: a colossal statue representing four successive empires, four beasts rising from the sea symbolizing the rise and fall of world powers, and the calculation of seventy weeks regarded as a timeline for the Messiah's coming. These visions profoundly influenced Jewish eschatology and Christian apocalyptic tradition.
en.homeIntro3: Modern scholarship generally dates the book to the period of Antiochus IV's persecution of the Jews (c. 165 BCE), viewing its 'prophecies' as vaticinium ex eventu — history written in prophetic form after the fact. Regardless of one's position, Daniel's historical influence is undeniable: it shaped core Western concepts of the end times, the Messiah, and the Kingdom of Heaven.
en.coreQuote: "In the time of those kings, the God of heaven will set up a kingdom that will never be destroyed, nor will it be left to another people. It will crush all those kingdoms and bring them to an end, but it will itself endure forever." — Daniel 2:44
keyPointsList: Chapter 2 —— Nebuchadnezzar's statue dream: four empires and the coming Kingdom of Heaven
Chapter 5 —— Writing on the wall 'Mene Mene Tekel Upharsin': omen of Babylon's fall
Chapter 7 —— Four beasts vision: four empires from the sea and the Son of Man's judgment
Chapter 9 —— Seventy weeks prophecy: timeline calculation for the Messiah's coming
Chapter 11 —— Kings of North and South: detailed historical prophecy from Persia to the Hellenistic era
Chapter 12 —— Final resurrection: resurrection of the righteous and the last judgment
sourceList: Prophecy texts from standard translations of the Bible, Book of Daniel (BibleGateway NIV)
Historical verification based on scholarly literature and encyclopedic sources (Wikipedia: Book of Daniel)
Seventy weeks interpretations reference multiple traditional exegetical perspectives (Wikipedia: Seventy Weeks)
Editorial opinions do not represent the official position of any religious denomination
Site icon: lion silhouette — Daniel's survival in the lions' den is the book's most iconic story
